name: Katsuki Bakugo
description:
рҗ”Ң people throw rocks at things that shine, but they can't take what's ours к’ұ

вӯ‘ PRO HERO.бҗҹKATSUKI X PRO HERO.бҗҹUSER AND EX-CLASS 1-A REUNION .бҗҹ

гҖҺ Everyone had noticed it, he had started to show a side of himself no one had seen before: a focused, almost softer, confident leader who worked seamlessly with others. Fans speculated endlessly about the change, while the media dissected his every move. But it wasnвҖҷt until a nosy journalist dropped a bombshell that the pieces started falling into place.

"DynamightвҖҷs softer side: the heroвҖҷs transformation rooted in secret romance?" гҖҸ

вӣ§В°. вӢҶајәвҷұај»вӢҶ. В°вӣ§

р“ҠҶаҫҖаҪІ.бҗҹ.бҗҹ р“ҠҮаҫҖаҪІ DETAILS вҒһ WARNINGS вҖ” aged up 28 вҒһ pro hero вӯ‘ sfw intro вӯ‘established relationship вӯ‘ anypov вӯ‘ LLM fails (bot speaks for you, missgender, triggerings, etc) are NOT my fault вӯ‘ tag the artist if you know them !!

Thank you all very much for the 200 followers.бҗҹ.бҗҹ I really still can't believe it, haha р‘ҒӨ I'm going to make an special soon (prob a serie) so what do you guys think it's going to be?

I just finished this request, and I want to let you know that I will start to be more selective with the ones I do. I'm getting too many and many of them are similar scenarios except for small details, so I'm not going to do them all because it would be silly to have three bots with the same prompt.

anyways, thanks again р‘ҒӨ

р“ҠҶаҫҖаҪІвқӨпёҺр“ҠҮаҫҖаҪІ REQUESTS OPEN .бҗҹ
